zkdistutils.command.install_lib
Implements the Distutils 'install_lib' command
(install all Python modules).
Command)
DistutilsOptionErrorz
.pyc
install_libz7install all Python modules (extensions and pure Python))
install-dir=
directory to install to)
build-dir=
bz'build directory (where to install from))
force
fz-force installation (overwrite existing files))
compile
compile .py to .pyc [default])
no-compileNz
don't compile .py files)
z	optimize=
Ozlalso compile with optimization: -O1 for "python -O", -O2 for "python -OO", and -O0 to disable [default: -O0])
skip-buildNz
skip the build steps)
install_dir
	build_dirr
optimize
skip_build

extr
_bytecode_filenames
install_lib._bytecode_filenamesc
Return the list of files that would be installed if this command
        were actually run.  Not affected by the "dry-run" flag or whether
        modules have actually been built yet.
        r'
pure_outputsZ
bytecode_outputsZ
ext_outputsr
install_lib.get_outputsc
Get the list of files that are input to this command, ie. the
        files that get installed as they are named in the build tree.
        The files in this list correspond one-to-one to the output
        filenames returned by 'get_outputs()'.
        r'
extendr6
inputsr'
